checks.detail: Local generation and embedding models are pinned; Eugene has no external LLM API path in runtime config.
GitHub Actions workflow runs pip-audit and rejects non-exact pins on pull requests.
All runtime dependencies use exact == pins.
Chroma deployment requires token authentication sourced from the Kubernetes secret template.

checks.control: T-14 API uses authenticated Chroma HTTP client in server mode
checks.detail: Retriever switches to HttpClient when CHROMA_HOST is not localhost and supplies token auth when configured.
Default-deny policy is paired with Chroma ingress allow-list from eugene-api pods only.

checks.control: T-15 API service account least privilege
checks.detail: API service account is bound to an empty namespace-scoped Role and does not mount an API token.
POST /query enforces a per-token in-process request limit, with Kubernetes config exposing the limit.

residual_risk: This is static evidence. A deployed-cluster BREAK run must still curl Chroma directly and prove unauthenticated access is rejected.
External LLM APIs are out of scope for Eugene. Adding one later requires a new COMPLY boundary and renewed BREAK evidence.
